title: Which Ben Stiller Character Is Secretly Your Personality? (Yes, All Eight Are Valid)
dek: From male-model himbo to grieving control freak to daydreaming office drone — Stiller's built an entire multiverse of neurotic energy, and one of these guys is basically you.

quiz.intro: No wrong answers — just go with your gut and let your inner Ben Stiller character reveal itself.

questions.question: Your morning routine gets thrown off by five minutes. What's your reaction?

answers.text: Doesn't matter, I still look incredible
I hit the gym twice as hard to compensate
I awkwardly apologize to everyone in the room, including furniture
I run the whole family through a timed fire drill just in case

questions.question: How do you handle a major life setback?

answers.text: I start a rivalry with whoever caused it
I try way too hard to win back everyone's approval
I double down on control and routine so nothing else can hurt me
I lean fully into method-acting my way through the pain

questions.question: Someone challenges you to try something completely out of character. What happens?

answers.text: I try it purely to impress someone's family
I refuse — safety protocols exist for a reason
I commit way too hard and injure myself proving a point
I accept begrudgingly and complain the entire time

questions.question: What's your relationship with your career?

answers.text: It's stressful but at least I'm respected by people who matter
I was a huge deal once and I will remind you constantly
I quit my dream and now I'm a carpenter with a lot of unresolved feelings about it
It's fine, I guess, but I feel like I'm meant for something bigger

questions.question: How do you deal with a family member who constantly lets you down?

answers.text: I turn it into a dramatic personal narrative for my own comeback story
I get a professional therapist and still complain about it constantly
I daydream about a version of them who actually shows up for me
I run a full risk assessment on the relationship

questions.question: Pick the compliment you'd most want to hear:

answers.text: "You're onto something, you know."
"You really came alive out there."
"You made a really smart, calculated decision."
"You're so ridiculously good-looking."

questions.question: What's your idea of a perfect romantic gesture?

answers.text: Finally saying what I actually feel instead of running away from it
Eating something disgusting just to prove I've changed
Honestly, they should be grateful I noticed them at all
Winning something to prove I deserve them

questions.question: Your biggest flaw, if you're honest:

answers.text: I over-plan everything so I never actually have to feel anything
I mistake vanity for self-worth
I need to win, always, no matter the cost
I try so hard to please everyone I lose myself completely

questions.question: What would your friends say about you behind your back?

answers.text: "He genuinely thinks he's the main character of everything."
"He'll turn a game night into a blood feud."
"He tries way too hard, but you can't hate him for it."
"He's a good guy underneath all that armor, if you can get through it."

questions.question: Last one: what does your ideal ending look like?

answers.text: A trophy, a rematch, and total vindication
Finally being accepted by the family I fought so hard to win over
Loosening up, letting the people I love back in
A comeback nobody saw coming, applause included

results.name: Derek Zoolander
results.subtitle: Zoolander (2001)
results.description: You are supremely, unshakably confident — sometimes to the point of being a little dense about it. You don't just walk into a room, you turn and walk into a room, several times if needed, because presentation is everything to you.

results.name: White Goodman
results.subtitle: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
results.description: You are pure competitive energy in human form. You will turn literally any low-stakes situation into a winner-take-all showdown, and you will absolutely make it weird.

results.name: Greg Focker
results.subtitle: Meet the Parents (2000)
results.description: You just want everyone to like you — and you will try way, way too hard to make that happen, usually with disastrous results. Deep down you're a genuinely sweet, well-meaning person who keeps getting punished for it.

results.name: Chas Tenenbaum
results.subtitle: The Royal Tenenbaums (2001)
results.description: You cope with pain by controlling everything you possibly can. Underneath the tracksuits and the fire drills is someone who's still grieving and terrified of losing what's left — and who eventually, slowly, learns to let his guard down.

results.name: Tugg Speedman
results.subtitle: Tropic Thunder (2008)
results.description: You are always performing, even when the cameras (metaphorically) aren't rolling. You desperately need a comeback, and you will commit disturbingly hard to getting it — full commitment, no half-measures.

results.name: Roger Greenberg
results.subtitle: Greenberg (2010)
results.description: You're self-involved, a little exhausting, and not always easy to be around — but there's real depth under the neuroses. You're generally just afraid of taking a risk on real connection, and when you finally do, it means something.

results.name: Walter Mitty
results.subtitle: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty (2013)
results.description: You escape a mundane life through elaborate daydreams — but you're also the one most likely to eventually just go live the adventure instead of imagining it. You've got more courage in you than anyone gives you credit for.

results.name: Reuben Feffer
results.subtitle: Along Came Polly (2004)
results.description: You are the risk-averse insurance analyst of your friend group, running mental cost-benefit calculations before you commit to anything, including relationships. Eventually you learn the safest choice on paper is rarely the one that actually makes you happy.
